case_title: GUST, THOMAS A., TRUSTEE vs. QUINONES, BORIS et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUST, THOMAS A., TRUSTEE SERVED FEB-03-1999, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT QUINONES, BORIS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUST, THOMAS A., TRUSTEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUINONES, BORIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 245 LEAVENWORTH ST. #28, LEASE FORFEITED, -NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL LEASE PER CRC 522.
